title: Kl's Fluffy Creatures
description: Just a silly little mod that adds new floofy creatures to your world :3
body:
![Title :3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57a4077b2580e6b9148a40cfb44db078bbaed329.png)



> OwO Whats this?

Kl's Fluffy Creatures (Or Klon's Fluffy Creatures) its a small mod that adds... Well as the name  suggests, new fluffy creatures to Minecraft, yep im talking about furries. Now you can explore the world filled with all kinds of furries. This mod was created because i just couldnt find any furry mods that met my needs, so i just created one for myself, and now i want to share it with yaal :3

Now you can play minecraft with over 100+ brand new mobs, and that number is still growing, i are also working on adding some cool items and fursuits, its a concept... FOR NOW

Yes i have some fixes and reworks to do, ill do it in the future

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

(IMPORTANT, I HAVE USED A FEW TEXTURES FROM THE INTERNET, I DONT CLAIM ANY OF THEM AND I RESPECT THE CREATORS)
</details>



#
Q&A (Kinda)

Q: Will you add this and this animal?  
A: If i like the idea, yea sure.

Q: Where are the older versions of the mod?
A: They exist, i just dont think there is a reason to post them, theese were BETA versions send to my friends.
